text.title: Agency Tiered-Proposal System Output Contract
text.summary: Defines the proposal document schema with mandatory 3-tier comparison.

forbidden.pattern: tiers[].deliverables containing vague phrases: "ongoing support", "as needed", "tbd"
discount, "starting at", or à la carte pricing within the tier table (erodes anchoring)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Tier names may be branded (Essentials / Core / Premium, Starter / Growth / Scale) but mapping to Good/Better/Best must be unambiguous.
For one-time projects bundled into a retainer, list as add-ons OUTSIDE the tier comparison.
If the lead's stated budget is far below all 3 tiers, send a clean-no with a referral to a smaller-shop instead of underwater pricing.

list.item: exactly 3 tiers, all with explicit scope, SLA, term
Better tier sized as the target choice (deliverables match all stated needs)
Good is 60-70% of Better, Best is 150-180% of Better
case studies match the lead's domain or problem shape
next steps include a signature link AND a clarification-meeting offer
no à la carte / discount / "starting at" pricing inside the tier table
